name: elm-frotz
description: Z-Machine version 3 interpreter for interactive fiction

scripts.test-czech: npm run build-harness && node harness/run.js testing/compliance/czech.z3 < /dev/null > /tmp/czech-run.log && cat /tmp/czech-run.log && grep -q 'Failed: 0' /tmp/czech-run.log
scripts.test: npm run test-elm && npm run test-czech
